practicalExamples.description: Automate initial customer inquiry processing through Slack using Launchpad Build AI's MLM to categorize and assign tickets based on urgency and department.

implementationSteps.example: Require human review before executing financial transactions

implementationSteps.action: Implement logging for all AI interactions
implementationSteps.example: Record every automated decision for audit and improvement purposes

implementationSteps.action: Set up failure handling and fallback procedures
implementationSteps.example: Route complex queries to human agents when AI confidence is low

commonMistakes.impact: Can lead to incorrect automation decisions and potential business disruption

commonMistakes.impact: Risk of costly errors in financial or sensitive business processes

commonMistakes.mistake: Failing to log AI decisions for compliance and improvement
commonMistakes.impact: Makes it difficult to audit decisions and improve AI performance over time
